title: AnalysisSection
description: The 'analysis' subobject inside .spectra-result.json. Spec 037 adds the 'technique_breakdown' field; all other fields are unchanged.

breakdown.description: Counts of identified behaviors grouped by category. Keys are configured category names; values are counts.

technique_breakdown.description: NEW in spec 037. Counts of identified behaviors grouped by ISTQB technique short code. Empty object when no behaviors carry a technique tag.
